message:
feat: MVCC invariants + PageBuf Clone fix + ECS enhancements (bd-3t3.1 bd-3t3.2)

- Add invariants.rs: visible() predicate, TxnManager, SerializedWriteMutex,
  VersionStore with 18 tests including E2E concurrent schedule
- Fix PageBuf Clone: derive(Clone) produced misaligned buffers because
  cloned Vec gets new heap address invalidating computed offset
- Add E2E test exercising full MVCC core types roundtrip flow
- Expose VersionIdx accessors for cross-module use
- Expand ECS object model and glossary types
- Update GF(256) verification tests and harness

59 tests pass across fsqlite-mvcc (41 core_types + 18 invariants)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
